creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
Were the repcached files intentionally removed from distinfo or was that
an oversight?  If the former, we should inform users that REPCACHED is
unavailable with the new memcached.

Also, mnag@ has been inactive for over six months; if you are interested
in adopting this port, please do so and also grab ports/158985, which
you submitted several weeks ago.  I've copied Mark, with whom I've
previously discussed the maintainership of other mnag@ ports.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
